## Summary

Describe the change and why it exists.

## Testing

List the checks you ran and any manual verification you performed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the problem being solved
- [ ] I updated docs or release-facing copy if needed
- [ ] I considered settings, migration, or compatibility impact
- [ ] I attached screenshots or notes for UI changes if useful

## Follow-Up

Anything intentionally left for a later issue or release.
